title: shulkers voidic ender expansion
description: this is a Minecraft ender expansion mod.
body: This is my ender expansion mod. It adds new bosses,mobs,music disc,blocks,ores,items,biomes,structures,acheivments,loot tables,boss musics,and more to the end dimension.There are also blocks called vaults that when broken drops a assortment of 5 random items(only works in survival mode).An example of one of the new bosses is the vengful heart of ender from minecraft dongeons with its own boss music.A example of a new mob is the ender creeper(there are a lot more mobs).A new ore example is the emberdust ore.Also there are some new structures such as the end ruins and the ender dongeons.There are new biomes such as the end wilds biome with yellow grass lots of new trees lots of new ores mobs and structures it is the most common biome.There is also altered end city loot tables and stronghold library loot tables.This mod is for forge 1.20.1 please enjoy.![the improved end city loot tables](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc3d58bfd3ca4fc572342e03d73b740d71db8eee.png)
